zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanche de Joigny於大約1222年受洗時，她的父親Guillaume I de Joigny65歲，母親Beatrix de Sancerre31歲。她於1222年與Guillaume de Chauvigny結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1252年在法國崔傑維爾享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Blanche de Joigny于大约1222年受洗时，她的父亲Guillaume I de Joigny65岁，母亲Beatrix de Sancerre31岁。她于1222年与Guillaume de Chauvigny结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1252年在法国崔傑維爾享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche de Joigny was christened about 1222, her father, Guillaume I de Joigny, was 65 and her mother, Beatrix de Sancerre, was 31. She married Guillaume de Chauvigny in 1222. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1252, in Vierzon, Cher, Centre, France, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanche de Joigny a été baptisée environ 1222, son père, Guillaume I de Joigny, avait 65 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de Sancerre, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume de Chauvigny en 1222. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1252, à Vierzon, Cher, Centre, France, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Blanche de Joigny um 1222 getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume I de Joigny 65 und ihre Mutter Beatrix de Sancerre 31. Sie hat 1222 Guillaume de Chauvigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1252 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Vierzon, Cher, Centre, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Joigny è stato battezzato circa 1222, sua padre, Guillaume I de Joigny, aveva 65 anni e sua madre, Beatrix de Sancerre, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume de Chauvigny nel 1222. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1252, nel Vierzon, Cher, Centre, Francia, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Blanche de Joignyが約1222年に洗礼を受けた時，父Guillaume I de Joignyは65歳，母Beatrix de Sancerreは31歳であった。1222年にGuillaume de Chauvignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1252年にフランスセントアチャーヴィエルゾンで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche de Joigny(이)가 대략 1222년에 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume I de Joigny(은)는 65세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix de Sancerre(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1222년 Guillaume de Chauvigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1252년 프랑스 세트르 처 비르존에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Joigny foi batizada aproximadamente 1222, seu pai, Guillaume I de Joigny, tinha 65 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de Sancerre, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume de Chauvigny em 1222. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1252, em Vierzon, Cher, Centre, França, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanche de Joigny была крещена около 1222 г., её отцу по имени Guillaume I de Joigny было 65 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Sancerre, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de Chauvigny в 1222 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1252 г. в местности виирзон, чир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Blanche de Joigny se bautizó aproximadamente 1222, su papá, Guillaume I de Joigny, tenía 65 años y su mamá, Beatrix de Sancerre, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Guillaume de Chauvigny en 1222. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1252, en Vierzon, Cher, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 31 años.
